case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. LUIZ RICARDO ARAUJO DUARTE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-24-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT LUIZ RICHARDO ARAUJO DUARTE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUARTE, LUIZ RICARDO ARAUJO $1,924.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,924.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 3/15/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/27/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
